message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EFEFEF
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor SecurityEngineer as SE
participant EventBus as EB

box "Security Profile Manager" #C98585
  boundary spm as SPM
end box

box "Software Defined Infrastructure" #C9C98A
  participant storageresource as SR
end box

participant securityprofile as SP

SE -> SPM : Monitor Security Profile
SPM -> SR : create (name: secProfileMSP,file: ./templates/secprofile.yml)
EB <-.. SPM : securityprofile.create
SPM -> SP : status (name: secProfileMSP)
EB <-.. SPM : securityprofile.status

@enduml
